title: Armor of the Ages
description: A Minecraft mod that adds animated armors from various culture. The perfect mod to defend your dirt & cobblestone house with style !
body:
![New armor in Armor of the Ages : Exalted Aurum](https://i.imgur.com/dGYhLAY.gif)
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) **Armor of the Ages** adds nicely looking cultural themed 3D animated armors into Minecraft. The perfect mod to defend your dirt & cobblestone house with style ! Each armor has stats, can be looted into the overworld and give you a unique bonus when the full set is worn. ## Key features: ### Armor stats: | Armor | Helmet | Chest | Legs | Boots | Toughness | KBR | |---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:| | Bamboo Hat | 1 | — | — | — | 0 | 0 | | Domaru | 1 | 3 | 2 | 1 | 0 | 0 | | Iron Plate | 2 | 6 | 5 | 2 | 0 | 0 | | O-Yoroi | 2 | 6 | 5 | 2 | 0 | 0 | | Centurion | 2 | 6 | 5 | 2 | 0 | 0 | | Pharaoh | 3 | 8 | 6 | 3 | 2.0 | 0 | | Holy | 3 | 8 | 6 | 3 | 3.0 | 0.1 | | Exalted Aurum | 3 | 8 | 6 | 3 | 3.0 | 0.1 | | Raijin | 3 | 8 | 6 | 3 | 3.0 | 0.1 | | Anubis | 3 | 8 | 6 | 3 | 3.0 | 0.1 | | Quetzalcoatl | 3 | 8 | 6 | 3 | 3.0 | 0.1 | --- ## Armor set bonuses: | Armor | Set Bonus | Effect | |---|---|---| | Domaru | Night Butterfly | Speed I at night. Strength I when sneaking | | Pharaoh | Son of the Dunes | Fire Resistance and Glowing always. Haste I in desert | | Quetzalcoatl | Venom Blood | Hunger and Poison always. Strength scales with HP | | Holy | Protector of the Weak | Resistance I always. Upgrades near monsters | | Raijin | Calm as Thunder | Agility in clear skies. Power in rain and storms | | Iron Plate | Man of Steel | Resistance I at all times | | O-Yoroi | Ancestral Strength | Strength I at all times | | Centurion | Spartan Stamina | Saturation I. Food bar stays full | | Anubis | Father of the Undead | Health Boost and Wither always. Scales with HP | | Exalted Aurum | Creature of the Abyss | Penalties on surface. Power in depths and dimensions | | Bamboo Hat + O-Yoroi | Spirit of the Field | Haste I | --- ## Lootable armors | Armor | Structures | |---|---| | Bamboo Hat | Abandoned Mineshaft. Village Taiga House. Shipwreck Supply | | Domaru | Village Weaponsmith. Simple Dungeon | | Centurion | Ruined Portal | | Iron Plate | Village Armorer. Simple Dungeon | | O-Yoroi | Shipwreck Treasure | | Pharaoh | Desert Pyramid | | Anubis | Desert Pyramid | | Exalted Aurum | Ancient City | | Holy | Village Temple | | Quetzalcoatl | Jungle Temple | | Raijin | Bastion Treasure | ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Ingame Configurations ### Armor body type choice: Manually let you select the armor body type your want : Male or Female ![](https://i.imgur.com/V145oNN.gif) ### Custom armor properties: Manually let you change the armor properties of each armor parts. **You will need to restart the game to apply the changes** ![](https://i.imgur.com/8FQHe6O.gif) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Overriding Recipes All recipes can be overridden or removed via a datapack, without modifying the mod itself. This is useful for modpacks or custom servers. **Datapack structure:** ``` my_datapack/ ├── pack.mcmeta └── data/ └── armoroftheages/ └── recipes/ └── .json ``` **`pack.mcmeta`** (required at the root of the datapack): ``` { "pack": { "pack_format": 15, "description": "My custom AotA recipes" } } ``` `pack_format: 15` is the correct value for Minecraft 1.20.1. **Installation:** place the datapack folder (or its `.zip`) in: * Single-player: `.minecraft/saves//datapacks/` * Server: `/world/datapacks/` Then run `/reload` in-game or restart the server. *** **Override a recipe** by placing a custom `.json` file at the matching path. The full list of recipe files is available on GitHub: * [Recipes](https://github.com/DawnOfTimeMC/armoroftheages/tree/1.20.1-master/common/src/main/resources/data/armoroftheages/recipes) **Remove a recipe** by overriding the file with an empty JSON object: ``` {} ``` Minecraft will fail to parse the file, log a warning, and silently skip the recipe. The game loads normally, this is not a crash. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our mods
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits * Development, models and textures by Poulpinou. * Special thanks to **mr_ch0c0late** for its Centurion armor, and to **Hahdrim** for the Iron Plate armor ! * [Minecraft Title Generator](https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/) from Ewan Howell has been used for the project name. [Support](https://ko-fi.com/ewanhowell) this guy, he is a goddamn hero
